title: Campaign Monitor vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor and Omnisend. See pricing, features, and ratings to pick the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Omnisend: Detailed Comparison
intro: Campaign Monitor and Omnisend are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Campaign Monitor focuses on agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Omnisend specializes in ecommerce with integrated SMS and push notifications. This comparison will help you determine which tool aligns best with your business goals.
choose_a_if: You manage multiple client brands and need separate account management
Your primary focus is email marketing with advanced journey automation
You work in an agency setting with team collaboration requirements
choose_b_if: You run an ecommerce business and want email, SMS, and push in one platform
You're budget-conscious and want to start with a generous free tier
You need pre-built workflows optimized for online retail

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Omnisend?
faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor excels at multi-brand management for agencies, while Omnisend is superior for ecommerce businesses needing omnichannel marketing. Omnisend currently has higher customer satisfaction ratings on both G2 and Trustpilot.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend is cheaper for most users because it offers a free tier with 250 subscribers. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month, while Omnisend's paid plans start at $16/month. For startups and small businesses, Omnisend's free option provides better initial value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, most email platforms support contact list exports and imports. You'll be able to migrate your subscriber lists, though campaign history and automation workflows typically need to be recreated manually. Both platforms should have migration guides or support available to help with the process.
